prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组最低位次分别为4161→3886→3496→8023→3578。2024年因甘肃省首年新高考（文理分科改为物理类/历史类），位次出现异常后移至8023，2025年迅速回归至3578，恢复至2023年水平附近。近3年（2023-2025）位次在3496-3578区间窄幅波动，整体呈稳中略升态势，2025年基准位次约3578名；该校在甘肃省理科组招生计划：2021年78人→2022年77人→2023年78人→2024年81人→2025年77人→2026年105人。2026年计划较2025年大幅增加28人（增幅约36.4%），为近年最大扩招幅度，显著降低录取竞争烈度，推动位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第41名（2021年40→2022年40→2023年43→2024年41→2025年42→2026年41），排名稳定在40-43名区间，属于国内顶尖211理工类院校，办学层次和综合实力对考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸火灾事故，对校园安全感知有一定影响；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，整体关注度一般。未见明显投档断档记录，历史报考心理较为平稳；系统科学A+、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-。其中计算机类、电子信息类、交通运输类等招生专业直接对应A级学科，学科实力突出，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业持续高热推荐（2024年），电气工程及其自动化高热推荐（74.28），均为北交大核心招生方向，社会热度对位次有向上支撑。甘肃省2026年高考报名总人数218700人，按2025年物理类占比67.5%估算物理类约147623人，较2025年121443人增长约21.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；北京交通大学位于北京市，对甘肃考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在甘肃招生占比约1.2%-2.8%（2025年甘肃招生7人，占全国总招生598人的1.17%），属于非本省招生但计划相对稳定的院校。北京作为一线城市，就业资源丰富，对考生报考意愿有正向拉动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3578、2026年大幅扩招36.4%（推动位次后移约780名）与甘肃物理类考生增长21.6%（推动位次前移约450名）的对冲效应，扩招净效应约330名后移；但计算机/电子信息等核心专业持续高热、学校软科排名稳定在41名、北京地域优势等因素对位次形成向上支撑。经综合权衡，预测2026年理科组最低位次约4329名，较2025年小幅后移约751名，区间3829-4829名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 4161 → 3886 → 3496 → 8023 → 3578. In 2024, due to Gansu's first year of the new college entrance examination (changing from arts/science division to physics/history categories), the ranking abnormally shifted to 8023, but quickly returned to 3578 in 2025, recovering to around the 2023 level. In the past three years (2023-2025), rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 3496-3578 range, showing a stable and slightly rising trend, with a baseline ranking of about 3578 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu: 78 in 2021 → 77 in 2022 → 78 in 2023 → 81 in 2024 → 77 in 2025 → 105 in 2026. The 2026 plan increases by 28 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 36.4%), the largest expansion in recent years, significantly reducing admission competition and pushing rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is 41st in 2026 (40 in 2021 → 40 in 2022 → 43 in 2023 → 41 in 2024 → 42 in 2025 → 41 in 2026), stable within the 40-43 range, making it a top-tier 211 science and engineering institution. Its academic level and comprehensive strength strongly attract candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving laboratory explosion and fire accidents, which somewhat affects campus safety perception. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, but overall attention is average. No obvious admission gaps or breaks have been recorded, and historical application psychology is relatively stable. Disciplines: Systems Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. Among these, computer, electronic information, and transportation majors directly correspond to A-level disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended (2024), and electrical engineering and automation is highly recommended (74.28), all core directions of Beijing Jiaotong University, with social popularity supporting rankings upward. In 2026, the total number of Gansu college entrance exam registrants is 218,700. Estimating physics category students at 67.5% of the 2025 total, there are about 147,623 physics category students, an increase of about 21.6% from 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2%-2.8% (7 students enrolled in Gansu in 2025, accounting for 1.17% of the national total of 598), making it a non-local institution with relatively stable enrollment plans. As a first-tier city, Beijing has abundant employment resources, positively influencing candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3578, the 2026 significant enrollment expansion of 36.4% (pushing rankings backward by about 780 places), and the 21.6% increase in Gansu physics category candidates (pushing rankings forward by about 450 places), the net effect of expansion is a backward shift of about 330 places. However, factors such as the sustained high popularity of core majors like computer and electronic information, the university's stable Soft Science ranking at 41st, and Beijing's regional advantages provide upward support for rankings. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science group is about 4329, a slight backward shift of about 751 places from 2025, with a range of 3829-4829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 4329, range 3829-4829. Candidates with rankings within 3800 are advised to focus on Tier 1 Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and Computer Class; candidates with rankings between 4000-4500 should mainly apply for Tier 2 Transportation Class, Automation Class, and Electrical Class; candidates with rankings above 4500 can consider Tier 3 Civil Engineering Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class, etc., as safety choices. Beijing Jiaotong University's significant enrollment expansion in 2026 increases admission opportunities. Candidates are advised to reasonably combine their rankings with a mix of reach, match, and safety choices.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年文科组最低位次分别为745→798→4201→1309→1081。2023年因外国语言文学类专业位次异常暴跌至4201，2024年恢复至1309，2025年进一步回升至1081，呈持续回暖趋势。2025年基准位次约1081名；该校在甘肃省文科组招生计划：2021年8人→2022年9人→2023年9人→2024年8人→2025年10人→2026年10人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第41名，排名稳定。虽以理工科见长，但211层次对文科考生仍有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面（实验室安全事故），但主要影响理工科报考心理；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），整体关注度中等。文科招生专业少，声誉影响有限；该校文科相关学科中，管理科学与工程A-与文科试验班（工商管理、会计学）相关；法学专业无对应A级学科评估。整体文科实力不如理工科突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度分化观望（2024年），会计/财务/审计推荐（61.31），文科专业热度整体平稳。甘肃省2026年历史类考生按比例估算约71077人，较2025年58374人增长约21.8%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；北京交通大学位于北京市，对甘肃文科考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在甘肃文科招生计划仅10人，招生人数少但稳定，竞争格局相对清晰。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1081、招生计划持平、甘肃历史类考生增长约21.8%（推动位次前移约200名）等因素，竞争加剧效应占主导。同时法学、经管类专业热度平稳，无额外拉动或压制。经综合权衡，预测2026年文科组最低位次约1051名，较2025年小幅前移约30名，区间893-1209名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were 745 → 798 → 4201 → 1309 → 1081. In 2023, due to an anomaly in the rankings of foreign language and literature majors, it plummeted to 4201, recovered to 1309 in 2024, and further rebounded to 1081 in 2025, showing a continuous warming trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1081. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province's liberal arts group: 8 in 2021 → 9 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 8 in 2024 → 10 in 2025 → 10 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and the enrollment scale is stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking. Although it is strong in science and engineering, the 211 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (laboratory safety incident), but it mainly affects the psychology of science and engineering applicants. It ranks 45th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate overall attention. The university has few liberal arts majors, so the reputation impact is limited. Among its liberal arts-related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting). The law major has no corresponding A-level discipline evaluation. Overall, the strength of liberal arts is not as prominent as that of science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major is divided and wait-and-see (2024), while accounting/finance/auditing is recommended (61.31), and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is stable. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Gansu Province is about 71,077, an increase of about 21.8% from 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in Gansu. The university only enrolls 10 liberal arts students in Gansu, a small but stable number, making the competition landscape relatively clear.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1081, the stable enrollment plan, and the approximately 21.8% increase in history category candidates in Gansu (pushing the ranking forward by about 200 positions), the competition intensification effect dominates. At the same time, the popularity of law, economics, and management majors is stable, with no additional pull or suppression. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group is approximately 1051, a slight forward movement of about 30 positions from 2025, with a range of 893-1209.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting) (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- No other liberal arts enrollment majors (only Law and Liberal Arts Experimental Class are enrolled in 2025-2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- None (only 2 liberal arts enrollment majors, Tier 1 already covers all).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 1051, range 893-1209. There are only two liberal arts enrollment majors: Law and Liberal Arts Experimental Class. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 900 can aim for the Law major; candidates with rankings between 1000-1200 should focus on the Liberal Arts Experimental Class. Due to the very few enrollment majors, candidates should combine their own interests and career plans, considering Beijing Jiaotong University as a sprint or matching option in their liberal arts volunteer choices.
